instructions: Verify that the new systemd sandboxing directives do not measurably slow down service boot times.
Ensure native bash constructs are used in CI scripts to minimize overhead.

palette.focus: UX of error messaging and documentation
instructions: Ensure any failures related to tightened permissions yield clear, actionable log outputs for developers.
Review documentation updates for clarity and user understanding.
Audit the systemd sandboxing (ProtectSystem, NoNewPrivileges, PrivateTmp) to ensure root privileges are effectively limited where applicable.
Ensure that sandboxing exceptions (like omitting ProtectSystem=strict for neos-autoupdate.service) are well-justified and documented.
